items.name: 天間舘一里塚ケヤキの木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural monument (zelkova tree at a milestone mound). Town-designated by Shichinohe Town. Located in Tenmadate, Shichinohe Town.
